title: Which Eva character are you most like and why
display_title: Which Eva character are you most like and why
wikitext:
[]: Which Eva character are you most like and why? Post by redbomb » Tue Dec 25, 2012 11:59 pm I'm personally a lot like Asuka. I didn't like her at first because she was mean to Shinji who tried his best to appease her. But that was only because she her inner self didn't want to admit they were alike. Maybe thats what it was with my relationship with this character. I didn't want to like Asuka, but it was only because we were so much alike, mean to the people who cared the most, and I didn't want to be that type of person. But in the end, I let her in and now she is easily my favorite character. What about you? Which Eva character are you most like and why?

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 26, 2012 2:29 am http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7931/Which-character-do-you-empathize-with-the-most/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/6197/Relating-to-the-Characters/? http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/1111/
